title: Fix gateway native_sim Kconfig dependency warnings after module load
description: After project-LICHEN-s3n3 fixed LICHEN module Kconfig loading, west build -b native_sim lichen/apps/gateway -d build_gateway_check -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/Volumes/Attic/Desktop/Projects/project-LICHEN/lichen advances past undefined CONFIG_LICHEN symbols but still aborts during Kconfig warnings. CONFIG_LICHEN_L2=y is forced to n because LICHEN_LINK is not enabled, and native_sim SLIP/TAP settings also warn because NET_QEMU_SLIP/SERIAL-related dependencies are not satisfied. Decide the intended native_sim gateway config and update app/board Kconfig settings separately from module metadata.
close_reason: Fixed gateway native_sim Kconfig dependency warnings by enabling LICHEN_LINK and disabling Zephyr SLIP/TAP for native_sim; targeted build now passes Kconfig and stops on host platform native_sim limitation.
